Name: Validation - PE

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The indentation suggests that after the approval gateway block it goes to Task I But if approval is No it loops back The No Approval Needed path goes to Task G then presumably to Task I The Approval Yes path goes to Task G then presumably to Task I So Task G is a convergence point as well
